tasks.label: 🛡️ Safety: Type Check
tasks.detail: Runs a silent check for TypeScript errors without launching.

tasks.label: 🧪 Lab: Playtest (Sandbox)
tasks.detail: Hot-reloads code changes instantly on your test sub.

tasks.label: 📤 Deploy: Upload to Cloud
tasks.detail: Bundles code and creates a new version in the Dev Portal.

tasks.label: 📸 Monitor: Live Logs
tasks.detail: Streams logs from your live production subreddit.

tasks.label: 🔄 5. Maintenance: Update SDK
tasks.command: npx devvit update app && npm install
tasks.detail: Updates Devvit SDK and refreshes node_modules.

tasks.label: 🚀 Release: Publish (Private)
tasks.detail: Promotes your latest upload so it can be installed on large subreddits you moderate.

tasks.label: 🌍 Public: Submit to App Directory
tasks.detail: Submits your app for Reddit Admin review to make it available for ALL subreddits.

tasks.label: 💎 Release: Major Bump (1.0.0)
tasks.detail: Jumps to the next major version (e.g., 0.0.10 -> 1.0.0)

tasks.label: 🥈 Release: Minor Bump (0.1.0)
tasks.detail: Jumps to the next minor version (e.g., 0.0.10 -> 0.1.0)

tasks.label: 🩹 Release: Patch Bump (0.0.11)
tasks.detail: Increments the last number for small fixes.
